question.label: Visible impact
question.name: When your impact isn't visible, where does that show up most?
question.description: Drills into her 'impact is visible' comment to locate the recognition gap before moving on.

answer: Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.

assessment.note: Communication feedback is still unresolved and occupying her attention, which mildly drags both engagement and energy; also hints at a clarity issue worth probing next.

history.answer_excerpt: I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.
Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
A lot of energy went into firefighting and context switching.
